summary: iter192 comprehensive testing complete. All 24 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend fully verified: (1) Staff Mobile shell loads and auto-registers web push device on first render, (2) Group Event Attendee page caches itinerary to localStorage with stale-while-revalidate pattern, (3) Desktop Sidebar tri-state collapse works (expanded→collapsed→hidden→expanded with visible handle in hidden state). Fixed critical Vite bundling issue with Capacitor imports.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed Vite bundling error: @capacitor/device and @capacitor/push-notifications imports were causing 500 error on StaffMobile route. Changed from `import(/* @vite-ignore */ ...)` to `new Function('m', 'return import(m)')` pattern to completely bypass Vite's static analysis
POST /api/push/register correctly creates push_devices row with {ok:true, device_id} response
POST /api/push/unregister correctly sets active=false on device record
GET /api/push/devices/mine returns devices scoped to the staff token
GET /api/push/devices/all (admin) returns all active devices across all staff
POST /api/push/broadcast (admin) logs to push_log and returns stats with queued counts (FCM/APNs keys not set)
Invalid/revoked token returns 401 on all push endpoints
POST /api/standup/send includes mobile_push fan-out stats AND calls send_push_to_staff() for each active briefing token
Group Event Attendee caches to localStorage with key pattern luccca_event_cache_{code}_{attendee_code}
Sidebar tri-state: expanded (220px) → collapsed (52px) → hidden (1px with sidebar-handle visible) → expanded
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_iter192_Frontend briefing token for push registration testing, registered 8 push devices during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter192 fully tested. Features: (1) Native Push Notifications scaffold at /api/push/* - POST /register creates push_devices row, POST /unregister sets active=false, GET /devices/mine returns staff's devices, GET /devices/all (admin) returns all, POST /broadcast (admin) fans out to all devices and logs to push_log. Without FCM_SERVER_KEY or APNS_* env vars, pushes are gracefully queued with status 'queued_no_fcm_key' or 'queued_apns_not_wired'. (2) POST /api/standup/send now calls send_push_to_staff() for each active briefing token holder, creating push_log entries for each registered device. (3) Staff Mobile shell (/m/staff/:token) auto-registers web push device on first render via registerPushDevice() in useEffect - uses localStorage key luccca_push_regd_{token} to skip re-registration within 7 days. (4) Group Event Attendee (/g/event/:code?attendee=CODE) implements stale-while-revalidate caching - paints from localStorage cache immediately, then revalidates from API. Cache key: luccca_event_cache_{code}_{attendee_code}. Shows 'Offline · showing cached itinerary' pill (data-testid='event-offline-pill') when served from cache without successful API response. (5) Desktop Sidebar tri-state collapse: expanded (220px) → collapsed/icon-only (52px) → hidden (0px with floating tab handle data-testid='sidebar-handle' visible at left edge) → expanded. State persisted to localStorage keys sidebar_expanded and sidebar_hidden. MOCKED: FCM/APNs (no keys set → returns 'queued_no_fcm_key' / 'queued_apns_not_wired'), Twilio SMS (queued when keys absent), Resend email (queued when keys absent).

push_devices_all.returns_all_devices: PASS - admin can list all active devices

push_broadcast.fans_out_to_devices: PASS - returns {ok, stats} with queued counts
push_broadcast.validates_title_body: PASS - returns 400 for missing/empty title or body

standup_send_native_push.includes_mobile_push_stats: PASS - response includes mobile_push with total_tokens, delivered, queued, failed

revoked_token_auth.register_401: PASS - revoked token cannot register device
revoked_token_auth.devices_mine_401: PASS - revoked token cannot list devices

group_event_offline_cache.caches_to_localstorage: PASS - event data cached with correct key pattern

frontend_staff_mobile_push_registration.auto_registers_device: PASS - web push device registered (verified in /api/push/devices/all)

frontend_group_event_attendee.offline_pill_hidden_when_online: PASS - pill not visible on successful API load
frontend_group_event_attendee.data_cached: PASS - localStorage contains cached event data

mocked_apis.fcm_apns: MOCKED - no FCM_SERVER_KEY or APNS_* keys set, pushes return 'queued_no_fcm_key' / 'queued_apns_not_wired'
mocked_apis.twilio_sms: MOCKED - keys not set, all paths take graceful queue fallback
mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCKED - keys not set, all paths take graceful queue fallback

bug_fix_applied.issue: StaffMobile route returned 'Error loading StaffMobile' due to Vite failing to resolve @capacitor/device and @capacitor/push-notifications imports
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: Vite's static analysis was trying to bundle Capacitor packages even with /* @vite-ignore */ comment
bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed dynamic import pattern from `import(/* @vite-ignore */ '@capacitor/...')` to `new Function('m', 'return import(m)')('@capacitor/...')` which completely bypasses Vite's static analysis
